title: chandassu

# chandassu

Authors: Boddu Sri Pavan
Published: 2025-11-02T20:01:50Z
Subjects: Arts and Humanities, Computer and Information Science, Engineering
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/QMOVTK

First ever dataset for "Chandassu", metrical poetry in Telugu Language (తెలుగు చంధస్సు). Our dataset comprises 4,651 carefully curated Telugu padyams spanning three primary prosodic classes (Vruttamu, Jaathi, Vupajaathi) and eight distinct types (Vutpalamaala, Champakamaala, Saardulamu, Mattebhamu, Kandamu, Teytageethi, Aataveladi, Seesamu).

Citation: Boddu Sri Pavan, 2025, "chandassu", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/QMOVTK, Harvard Dataverse, V1, UNF:6:5DqeRzI8w6D0zt6PKD8T0g== [fileUNF]
